creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
```
nstall  -m 0644 /tmp/port/work/nethack-3.6.1/doc/Guidebook.txt /tmp/port/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/nethack36
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/keyhelp
```

Both in poudriere and in a build in my 12-STABLE host. It's one of the files in dat/, and always installed.
